mapper.sql: select w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_type, w.warehouse_usage, w.ownership_type, w.provider_name, w.external_warehouse_code, w.owner_code, w.sync_mode, w.sync_status, w.last_sync_time, w.enable_location, w.allow_negative_stock, w.priority, w.contact_name, w.contact_phone, w.address, w.status, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark, ifnull(b.sku_count, 0) as sku_count, ifnull(l.location_count, 0) as location_count from erp_warehouse w left join ( select warehouse_id, count(*) as sku_count from erp_inventory_balance group by warehouse_id ) b on b.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id left join ( select warehouse_id, count(*) as location_count from erp_warehouse_location group by warehouse_id ) l on l.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: insert into erp_warehouse( warehouse_code, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, warehouse_usage, ownership_type, provider_name, external_warehouse_code, owner_code, sync_mode, sync_status, enable_location, allow_negative_stock, priority, contact_name, contact_phone, address, status, create_by, create_time, remark ) values( #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{warehouseType}, #{warehouseUsage}, #{ownershipType}, #{providerName}, #{externalWarehouseCode}, #{ownerCode}, #{syncMode}, #{syncStatus}, #{enableLocation}, #{allowNegativeStock}, #{priority}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update erp_warehouse set warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, warehouse_type = #{warehouseType}, warehouse_usage = #{warehouseUsage}, ownership_type = #{ownershipType}, provider_name = #{providerName}, external_warehouse_code = #{externalWarehouseCode}, owner_code = #{ownerCode}, sync_mode = #{syncMode}, sync_status = #{syncStatus}, enable_location = #{enableLocation}, allow_negative_stock = #{allowNegativeStock}, priority = #{priority}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_warehouse where warehouse_id in
#{warehouseId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from erp_inventory_balance where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}

select count(*) as totalCount, sum(case when warehouse_type in ('physical', 'self', 'return') then 1 else 0 end) as physicalCount, sum(case when warehouse_type in ('cloud', 'third_party') then 1 else 0 end) as cloudCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when warehouse_type in ('cloud', 'third_party') and sync_status in ('warning', 'failed') then 1 else 0 end) as syncAbnormalCount from erp_warehouse

select location_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, zone_code, usage_type, barcode, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from erp_warehouse_location where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} order by sort_order asc, location_code asc

select location_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, zone_code, usage_type, barcode, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from erp_warehouse_location where location_id = #{locationId}

select location_id, warehouse_id, location_code, location_name, zone_code, usage_type, barcode, sort_order, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from erp_warehouse_location where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and location_code = #{locationCode} limit 1
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_warehouse_location where location_id in
#{locationId}
